@startuml
title UML Diagram: Class ComponentPosition in Context

note "Hints\n- Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.\n- Click on a name to go to the corresponding page." as hints

class "Components::\nComponentPosition" as ComponentPosition {
  value : Integer
}

class "DataDescription::\nDataStructure" as DataStructure
class "Components::\nDataStructureComponent" as DataStructureComponent
class "CollectionsPattern::\nPosition" as Position

ComponentPosition -[hidden]-> DataStructure : has
ComponentPosition -[hidden]-> DataStructureComponent : indexes
ComponentPosition -[hidden]-> Position : «Refine»

ComponentPosition --> DataStructure : has
ComponentPosition --> DataStructureComponent : indexes
ComponentPosition ..> Position : «Refine»

note bottom of ComponentPosition : DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI) 1.0 - Components::ComponentPosition
